task: B1 — 后端业务链路验证与修复
summary: 5条核心业务链路全部验证完成，发现4个问题并已修复

chains.name: 创世→生成节点ID+私钥→获得100 New.B

issues.description: NewBEngine.initGenesis() 仅检查内存状态，重启后可重复创世覆盖账本
issues.fix: 添加磁盘级检查: if (this.ledger || this.isInitialized())

issues.description: IdentityManager.generateGenesis() 无幂等保护，重复调用会覆盖私钥导致身份永久丢失
issues.fix: 添加前置检查: if (this.hasGenesis()) throw

chains.data_flow_verified: POST /genesis → Ed25519密钥生成 → SHA-256派生NodeID → AES-256-GCM加密私钥 → 100 New.B注入账本 → H4证据记录 → 状态重置

chains.name: 创建目标→启动Auto-Runner→Trinity循环→PoO验证→New.B奖励

issues.description: runOnce() 绕过创世完成检查，可在未初始化节点上执行循环
issues.fix: 添加 hasGenesis() 前置检查

warnings: PoO finalizeTask 使用硬编码 baseReward=10，与 NewBEngine 减半机制不同步（报告值不准，实际余额正确）
auto-runner 无并发执行锁，短间隔可能导致竞态
chains.data_flow_verified: POST /goal → POST /runner/start → 前置检查(创世+目标) → AI-1提案 → AI-2审计 → AI-3决策 → PoO评分(PriorityScore≥85执行) → issuePoOReward → balance += reward

chains.name: 成功循环→Playbook→知识市场→购买→PoO追踪
chains.data_flow_verified: POST /governance/playbooks → POST /market/list(荷兰拍) → getCurrentPrice(时间衰减) → POST /market/buy(当前价成交) → POST /market/outcome(买家评分→historicalSuccessRate更新)

chains.name: 战略债务→联邦清算→还债任务

issues.description: 联邦清算端点未接入 SwarmManager.broadcastDebtClearing()，清算结果未广播到蜂群
issues.fix: 在清算后调用 getSwarmManager().broadcastDebtClearing() 广播债务到蜂群节点

chains.data_flow_verified: POST /governance/debts → runFederatedClearing(>7天债务→federated状态+1.5x赏金) → broadcastDebtClearing → POST /governance/debts/:id/resolve

chains.name: 蜂群启动→连接节点→知识传输→恶意举报
chains.data_flow_verified: POST /swarm/start → POST /swarm/connect(SHA-256派生peerID) → offerKnowledge/requestKnowledge广播 → POST /swarm/report(SHA-256证据哈希+defense_alert广播) → banPeer(creditScore=0)

api_key_fallback.details: resolveApiKey() 依次检查 config → settings store → 返回null; 三个角色各自生成结构化JSON fallback; execute()外层try/catch保证不崩溃

fixes_applied.change: initGenesis 添加磁盘级幂等检查 isInitialized()
generateGenesis 添加 hasGenesis() 幂等保护
runOnce() 添加创世完成前置检查
联邦清算端点接入 SwarmManager.broadcastDebtClearing()
